title: Connected Little Boxes
description: Use the Connected Little Box framework to build devices that respond to the world — buttons, NeoPixels, rotary encoders, stepper motors, and ultrasonic sensors, all orchestrated by the CLB manager system.

labs.title: Lab 1: CLB Setup
labs.desc: Install the CLB framework and run the Hello CLB test program

labs.title: Lab 2: Button Light
labs.desc: Light up a NeoPixel strip when a button is pressed

labs.title: Lab 3: Encoder Brightness
labs.desc: Use a rotary encoder to control NeoPixel brightness

labs.title: Lab 4: Stepper Motors
labs.desc: Wire 28BYJ-48 steppers via ULN2003 boards and drive a two-wheel robot using the CLB stepper manager

labs.title: Lab 5: Distance Sensor
labs.desc: Wire an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor and use the CLB hcsr04 manager to take distance readings and publish proximity events
